'''''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 3''' is the 3rd volume in the [[Dark Horse Comics]] black-and-white collections of the original [[Marvel Comics]] series of comic books.

This volume reprints issue numbers 51, 52, 60 and 66 of the original Marvel Comics comic book series.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 66|''Star Wars'' (1977) 66]]
